text:
Once upon a time, there was a young fox named Felicity who lived deep in the forest. She loved exploring the woods and often found herself curious about the creatures that lived there. On one particular day, while searching for berries, she stumbled upon a small, hidden glade where a gentle stream sang its melody. In the center of this beautiful spot, there grew an unusual tree - an ancient oak with leaves that shimmered in the dappled sunlight like fireflies.

Being wise beyond her years, Felicity knew this tree was special. On special occasions, she believed it could speak. One afternoon, she sat by its side and asked, "What do you have to tell me today?"

The tree hummed softly. "Felicity dear, I tell you of destiny. Your heart is brave and kind. You are chosen to protect this place."

Felicity felt hopeful. "From who?"
